query:
SELECT 
  p.name,
  p.sector,
  p.priority,
  p.location,
  COUNT(c.id) as total_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as send_ready_contacts,
  DATE(p.createdAt) as added_date
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.reportId = p.id
WHERE p.createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY p.priority, p.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 25;

SELECT 
  p.name,
  p.sector,
  p.priority,
  p.location,
  COUNT(c.id) as total_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as send_ready_contacts,
  DATE(p.createdAt) as added_date
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.reportId = p.id
WHERE p.createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY p.priority, p.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 25;
